history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian person with dark, tousled hair is sitting on a textured gray floor, leaning against a large, woven tan pillow. They are wearing a dark blue Adidas track jacket with white three-stripe detailing on the sleeves, a black t-shirt underneath, and loose white pants that appear to have distressed detailing near the knee. The person is holding a smartphone in their right hand, looking down at the screen, and is pulling the collar of their jacket up towards their face with their left hand.

The background features a modern retail or lounge setting. To the left, a sleek, light gray marble-patterned pillar stands near a small, silver metallic object. Further back, a wooden shelf unit displays folded clothing items in shades of burgundy, dark brown, and black on its top shelf, and several pairs of women's high-heeled shoes on a lower shelf. To the right of the person, a wooden surface holds a stack of books or magazines, with one open to a page with line drawings.

The lighting is soft and ambient, creating a relaxed and intimate mood. The color palette is dominated by the deep blue of the jacket, the stark white of the pants, the neutral tones of the pillow and floor, and the warm wood of the shelving and table. The overall style suggests a contemporary, fashionable, and somewhat casual aesthetic.
